component.name: cmux
component.summary: Terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents

description.p: cmux-gtk is a GTK4/libadwaita terminal multiplexer built with Rust and Ghostty. It combines terminal workspaces, an integrated WebKit browser with 100+ automation commands, and a rich socket API for AI agent control.

ul.li: Split panes with directional focus and zoom
Integrated browser with Playwright-style automation API
Shell integration for CWD, git branch, PR status, and port detection
Remote SSH workspaces with auto-bootstrap and SOCKS5 proxy
Command palette with 50+ commands and fuzzy search
V1 text and V2 JSON-RPC socket protocols (210+ methods)

description.p: First public release — full feature parity with macOS cmux 0.62.0.
